phases.title: Phase 1 — Truth layer
completed: destination-owned strict evidence projection for LLM-adapter
destination-owned strict evidence projection for Triage
verified observation of newer HIL and adapter-binding repository activity
remaining: persist a new ecosystem inventory after newer repository activity
classify HIL public surfaces, receiver receipts, handoff validation, and adapter aggregate binding
regenerate the remediation queue from current state
blockers: the last observed 72-repository inventory predates newer Site commits and cannot be treated as current

phases.title: Phase 2 — Execution layer
remaining: regenerate the queue after the inventory rescan
derive actions for the newer HIL and adapter-binding evidence
automatic convergence after destination evidence changes
blockers: the current queue is derived from the older inventory cycle
most repositories still lack destination-owned bounded runners

phases.title: Phase 3 — Runtime verification layer
completed: HIL public paths and response-detail implementation observed without inferring runtime success
remaining: observe a new Site runtime PASS receipt after the canonical policy repair
obtain auditor-classified HIL execution and receiver-receipt evidence
satisfy LLM-adapter live provider, storage, custody, reconstructability, and receipt gates

Triage lacks observed user-facing execution and outcome evidence

phases.title: Phase 4 — Governance layer
completed: stale inventory no longer presented as current
adapter aggregate binding recorded without inferring test success
public surface existence separated from user-outcome verification
remaining: machine classification of newer HIL and adapter-binding evidence
blockers: destination-owned evidence remains incomplete for most repositories
new repository activity requires auditor classification before it may affect completion or successor standing

phases.title: Phase 5 — Continuity layer
completed: HIL handoff and receiver-receipt structures observed
blockers: ecosystem-wide continuity packet is not yet complete
